title: 6pack Glass Jam Jars with Red Gingham Lid - 280ml/9oz - Hexagonal Storage Glass Jars, Clear Airtight Jar for Pickling, Chutney, Jam, Coffee
features: 【SIZE】 3.6in/9.14cm wide mouth diameter canning jars, easy to put in and take out food. Pack of 6 meets your daily needs, great for home use, daily food preservation, taking dessert jams on the go, or gift selection

【MATERIAL】 The small glass bottle is made of high quality thick glass, heat resistant and corrosion resistant. The lid is made of high quality aluminium with good protection and sealing to ensure good preservation of food

【USAGE and CARE】 The clear glass ensures maximum visibility, allowing you to easily see what food is inside, making your life more efficient. The bottle can be cleaned with a sponge manually or dishwasher
【KEEP FRESH】 Placing food in airtight glass jars helps maintain freshness and flavor, making it ideal for storing food ingredients such as spices, beans, rice, oats, flour, etc

【MULTIPURPOSE】 You can use this bottle to store your favourite variety of food such as sauce, jam, vegetables, candy, cookies, and other seasonings. These 280ml jars are also ideal for storing coins, small toys, and christmas present crafts.
